title: Reference-Counting GC Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan to add refcounted heap allocations (strings, closures) to Verb's codegen with zero new syntax.
notes: This is an execution plan (task/step checklist with code diffs), not an ADR/PRD/SPEC per taxonomy definitions. It implements a separate design spec (linked in cross_refs) rather than making the architectural decision itself. Classified as DOC (supporting/process document) since it contains no user stories/acceptance criteria (not PRD), no API/schema contract of its own (not SPEC), and no Context/Decision/Consequences structure (not ADR).
